docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $967.99 FILED BY GALVIN, MICHELLE A. AS TO DEFENDANT FROST, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION : REQUEST ORDER RE: WAIVER APPLICATION CONTINUED FROM OCT-24-1996 TO NOV-14-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
DEFT'S MONTHLY INCOME EXCEEDS DEFT'S MONTHLY EXPEN SES BY $310 PER MO.COURT FINDS THAT DEFT HAS THE ABILITY TO PAY THE FILING FEE FOR HIS APPEAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALVIN, MICHELLE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FROST, JASON $967.99 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $982.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
